query:
Subject: Krankmeldung
Description: Guten Tag, ich bin seit Montag krank. Ärztliches Zeugnis liegt vor.
Caller: Anna Müller
Classification: {"category": "Absence Management", "subcategory": "Sick Leave", "language": "DE", "missingInfo": []}
context: Scenario A - all information present, sick leave with certificate.
ground_truth: {"hrSummary": "Employee Anna Müller has reported sick leave starting Monday with medical certificate attached. No missing documentation. Route to Absence Management team for processing.", "scenario": "A", "language": "DE"}

query:
Subject: Mutterschaftsurlaub
Description: Ich bin schwanger, errechneter Termin 15. Juli. Attest kommt nächste Woche.
Caller: Sarah Keller
Classification: {"category": "Absence Management", "subcategory": "Maternity/Paternity Leave", "language": "DE", "missingInfo": ["Doctor's confirmation letter"]}
context: Scenario B - missing medical confirmation for maternity leave.
ground_truth: {"hrSummary": "Employee Sarah Keller is planning maternity leave with expected due date July 15. Medical confirmation letter is pending (expected next week). Cannot fully process until documentation received.", "scenario": "B", "language": "DE"}

query:
Subject: Changement d'adresse
Description: Bonjour, nouvelle adresse: Rue du Marché 15, 1204 Genève. Déménagement le 1er mars.
Caller: Pierre Dupont
Classification: {"category": "Personnel Administration", "subcategory": "Address Change", "language": "FR", "missingInfo": []}
context: Scenario A - complete address change with new address and date.
ground_truth: {"hrSummary": "Employee Pierre Dupont has requested an address update. New address: Rue du Marché 15, 1204 Genève. Move date: March 1. All information complete for processing.", "scenario": "A", "language": "FR"}

query:
Subject: Payslip question
Description: My March payslip shows CHF 450 under 'Other deductions' that I don't understand.
Caller: James Wilson
Classification: {"category": "Payroll & Compensation", "subcategory": "Salary Question", "language": "EN", "missingInfo": []}
context: Scenario A - salary query with specific deduction amount and pay period.
ground_truth: {"hrSummary": "Employee James Wilson has a question about an unrecognized deduction of CHF 450 on March payslip under 'Other deductions'. Needs payroll team review and explanation.", "scenario": "A", "language": "EN"}

query:
Subject: Demande de formation
Description: Formation PMP, CHF 3500, 5 jours en juin.
Caller: Sophie Martin
Classification: {"category": "Learning & Development", "subcategory": "Training Request", "language": "FR", "missingInfo": ["Manager approval"]}
context: Scenario B - training request missing manager approval.
ground_truth: {"hrSummary": "Employee Sophie Martin requests PMP certification training (CHF 3500, 5 days in June). Manager approval has not yet been provided. Cannot proceed until line manager confirms budget allocation.", "scenario": "B", "language": "FR"}

query:
Subject: Signalement harcèlement
Description: Comportement inapproprié d'un collègue avec remarques déplacées depuis plusieurs semaines.
Caller: Marie Leclerc
Classification: {"category": "Workplace & Compliance", "subcategory": "Harassment/Discrimination Report", "language": "FR", "missingInfo": []}
context: Scenario A - harassment report requiring sensitive handling and escalation.
ground_truth: {"hrSummary": "URGENT: Employee Marie Leclerc reports harassment by a colleague - inappropriate remarks over several weeks. Requires immediate escalation to Compliance team. Handle with strict confidentiality.", "scenario": "A", "language": "FR"}

query:

query:

Description: Leaving end of April, 3 years in Software Engineering team.

context: Scenario A - reference letter with departure date and tenure.
